title: If you could give any Eva character advice
display_title: If you could give any Eva character advice
wikitext:
[]: If you could give any Eva character advice             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Sep 17, 2009 11:13 pm If you could suddenly poof infront of any Eva character and warn them or give them helpful advice who would you talk to, and what would you tell them? I would tell Toji not to get in Unit-03 as well as the technicians, which in turn will save Shinji from leaving NERV in before the Zeruel battle, which will save everyone getting mentally messed up after that. Everyone will be in better mental states and if nobody gets mind-raped or exploding after fusion, all the pilots will be able to pilot. Shinji wouldn't get so attached to Kaworu because all his friends would be with him. 3rd Impact could be stopped if all the pilots killed the Eva Series. Also I would tell Misato to quit drinking so much. Her liver must look like swiss cheese.

[]: Re: If you could give any Eva character advice             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Sep 17, 2009 11:40 pm *whistle* HEY Shinji! SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Namikiri » Thu Sep 17, 2009 11:52 pm Kill yourself,kill yourself,kill yourself. Not to any character in particular. Or,to Shinji in EoE: Don't reject Instrumentality,fool!! After six thousand years of misery,humanity finally manages to conceptualize and realize a working solution to the human problem and one angsty teenager spoils it for everyone.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Sep 18, 2009 12:20 am God damn it be nice to each other.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Fri Sep 18, 2009 12:33 am Shinji, don't splooge on comatose chicks. Asuka, do NOT go into the light. Rei...don't be so damn creepy. Misato, go to driver's ed. Kaji, keep being awesome. Gendo, speak up. Ritsuko, quit failing.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Sep 18, 2009 12:44 am SIGH >.< Instrumentality would not be the answer if for nothing except not to feel pain but it is not heaven. But Insrumentality seemed to be the only way out. When you think about it all you cant help but to want to cry.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Fri Sep 18, 2009 12:58 am For everyone: Take a good look at the world and realize just how fucked up it is. However, one should not be filled with despair! Be filled with joy, and realize that you are blessed to live in a such a world. You are blessed to live in a world where people kill each other because they love each other. You are blessed to live in a world where children are sold as sex slaves, millions die from disease, countless lives are lost through war and genocide...and people care more about keeping certain people from getting married or if a cow was killed "humanely." You are blessed to live in such a fucked up world, because it's the funniest goddamn thing you can think of. Embrace the insanity, and laugh. Take a good look at the world, and laugh.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Sep 18, 2009 1:05 am Gendo, before you send that file to Kiel I suggest you think long and hard about the path you're considering. Is this really for Yui's sake, or for your own selfish needs? Even if it all works out and you do get her back, would she still be interested in the kind of man you'd have to become along the way?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 18, 2009 1:42 am To Gendo -- employ Gunnery Sergeant Hartman or nearest facsimile to take charge of the pilots, and not some youngster with a drink problem. To Shinji -- rub some dirt in it, rookie! You're not doing this because you want to, you're doing it because you have to. Life is not fair like that. To Asuka -- we all hit a ceiling some time, and the higher it is, the harder you hit; take it from someone who's been there too. Here's my number, call when you have to.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Sep 18, 2009 2:14 am We need AJ Johnson!

[]:             Quote Post by Namikiri » Fri Sep 18, 2009 2:22 am Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Instrumentality would not be the answer if for nothing except not to feel pain but it is not heaven.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Sep 18, 2009 4:17 am I already told the people in #egf that if Shinji were to ask me for advice, I'd tell him to kill himself. I have zero respect or tolerance for people like that.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Sep 18, 2009 5:48 am To Asuka - Learn to duck. And maybe buy a wipe-clean nightdress. To Shinji - Bring tissues. LOTS.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Sep 18, 2009 5:56 am Misato - Go to rehab. Pen-Pen - Keep up the good work.

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Fri Sep 18, 2009 5:56 am master_lloyd wrote: To Shinji - Bring tissues. LOTS.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Sep 18, 2009 6:16 am Oz wrote: master_lloyd wrote: To Shinji - Bring tissues. LOTS.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Sep 18, 2009 9:42 am Oh the tissues aren't for his tears...

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Fri Sep 18, 2009 10:40 am :: Hides in the bushes when Yui is breaking the news to Fuyutsuki that she's going out with Gendo. At the right moment, I start humming "(You Gotta) Kiss the Girl"::

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Fri Sep 18, 2009 12:17 pm To the guy in the barfight: Now's your only chance. Kill Gendo and save yourself, along with everyone else, a lot of misery. To Fuyutsuki: Take your chance now with Yui, you'll not get another. You just might be saving the world. To Shinji: You hate yourself. But, you might be able to love yourself. You are allowed to stay here and find out. As long as you are here, there's the opportunity for change. Now, get off your ass cuz you have work to do - time enough for psychoanalysis later. To Asuka: Get over yourself. There's no room for others when you take it all. You'll die a lonley woman if given the chance, and that's the upside. To Seele: Get help. Srsly. Sure, Instrumentality's a nice place to visit, but you wouldn't want to live there - if you really want to die, take yourselves out but leave the rest of us in peace. To the last couple: Looks like you're gonna be here awhile. Play nice. It'e better that way.

[]:             Quote Post by Namikiri » Fri Sep 18, 2009 12:36 pm master_lloyd wrote: To Asuka - Learn to duck. And maybe buy a wipe-clean nightdress.

I would tell Toji not to get in Unit-03 as well as the technicians, which in turn will save Shinji from leaving NERV in before the Zeruel battle, which will save everyone getting men
